title: Colors All Around
lrc:
[00:00.00]Red like an apple, blue like the sky,
[00:04.00]Yellow like the sunshine way up high.
[00:08.00]Green like a leaf, and orange like a pear,
[00:12.00]Purple like a grape — colors everywhere!
[00:16.00]Black like the nighttime, white like a cloud,
[00:20.00]Sing the colors, sing them loud!
[00:24.00]Red and blue and yellow, green,
[00:28.00]Beautiful colors to be seen!
